payload.answer: Rejected: unresolved pronouns make the subject and object of the preference unclear.

entity_resolution.reason: The proposed memory uses unresolved pronouns ('He', 'the other one') with no identifiable subject or preference object, so it is too ambiguous to store as durable memory.

details: Blocked memory creation because both the preference holder and preferred item are unresolved.

repair_options: Ask what 'the other one' refers to.
Restate the preference with explicit entities before storing.
